title: Please support LDCE cell type for xilinx architecture.
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

module latchp
    ( input d, clk, en, output reg q );
	always @*
		if ( en )
			q <= d;
endmodule

read_verilog latchp.v
synth_xilinx

## Expected behavior

   Number of cells:                  1
     LDCE                                1


## Actual behavior

   Number of cells:                  1
     $_DLATCH_P_                  1
